Potential reward from a Hive Sabotage cache.
While it can be installed on any rifle weapon, Firestorm only has noticeable effects on the following explosive weapons:
Does not affect the tendril range.
Only when equipped with Concentrated Arrow
Only when equipped with Concentrated Arrow
Has no effect on Komorex , Shedu , and Trumna (Primary Fire) despite their listed radial stat.
Since Firestorm increases blast radius, it increases total blast area with the square of the bonus and the blast volume with the cube of the bonus.
Due to the range increase, this mod lessens the damage falloff from the epicenter of the explosion.
This mod increases the range of self-stagger .
